---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

### Rational Inattention in Wage Growth Expectations

**Draft:** Coming soon!


## Work in Progress

### Memory, Frequency Bias, and Inflation Expectations

### Subjective Inflation-Unemployment Beliefs

with Anushka Mitra (Federal Reserve Board) and Prachi Srivastava (Heidelberg University)

### The Macroeconomic Impacts of Weather Shocks: Insights from the ENSO Phenomenon

**Draft:** Available upon request.
